images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful young Japanese female model with flawless skin texture and visible vellus hair, embodying a playful gravure idol aesthetic. She is dressed in a trendy, form-fitting camo military-style outfit featuring a cropped field jacket with delicate sheer lace panels and a tight cargo mini-skirt that accentuates her curvy hips and slim waist. She rests on a sofa by a large floor-to-ceiling window, holding a melting ice cream cone close to her lips. The lighting is a warm, bright candlelight glow that illuminates her face with clarity, contrasting against the underexposed, moody low-key background of the quiet library. Her large expressive eyes gaze away into the distance, lost in a daydream, with a cute, slightly mischievous smile. The background is rendered with aesthetic bokeh, shot on Sony A7R IV, 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, featuring depth of field, ray tracing, and global illumination.8k photo, Large breasts, deep cleavage, ample cleavage, sexy photo, beautilful girl without makeup
